Enter all mandatory information.  
Click Create to save the deposit.  
2.2 Save to Family Option On the Add Deposit page: * If Save to Family is checked, the deposit is created for the carrier family. * If Save to Family is unchecked, the deposit is created for the selected carrier.

(Either the batch or deposit can be updated.) * Missing Policy Number The selected case must have a valid policy number.You can add it by edit the case.
